lines.speaker: Hudo
lines.text: Hello there traveller. Would you like some groceries? I have a large selection.

lines.speaker: Hudo
lines.text: Hello there traveller. Would you like...

lines.speaker: Hudo
lines.text: Great Guthix! Where did you get those giant frogs' legs? They're enormous!

lines.speaker: Hudo
lines.text: Are you selling them? I'll give you 1000gp for all the frogs' legs you have!

lines.speaker: Hudo
lines.text: Oh well. Would you like to buy any groceries?

lines.speaker: Hudo
lines.text: A pleasure doing business with you. Now do you need any groceries?
